info.name: Grading API (v1)
info.description:
External-facing grading API for the ESL grading tool. Configure the `baseUrl` and `apiKey` collection variables before running any request.

See docs/API.md for the full contract.

variable.description: Replace with the staging or production base URL when testing against a deployed environment.
Raw API key issued by the grading-tool team. Never commit a real key to source control.

request.description: Grades a single essay against an inline rubric. Expect a 200 response with scores, feedback, inline_issues, and formattedText. Typical latency: 10-30s.

Grades multiple essays and streams per-essay results as Server-Sent Events. Postman will display the raw SSE stream; in production your server should consume it with a streaming JSON reader (see docs/API.md).
Demonstrates the 401 response when the Authorization header is missing. Expect: {"error":{"code":"unauthorized","message":"Missing or malformed Authorization header..."}}
Demonstrates the 401 response when the bearer token doesn't match a configured API key. Expect: {"error":{"code":"unauthorized","message":"Invalid API key"}}

Demonstrates a 400 validation error. An empty essay string is rejected at the controller boundary with no LLM call made. Expect: {"error":{"code":"invalid_request","message":"essay is required and must be a non-empty string"}}
